source: pybullet-rtc-record:pick_red_block (model smolvla, real per-cycle delays, p50 16 ticks @ 30 Hz, late cycles 0)
note: Deterministic simulation of latency-aware action-chunk scheduling (Real-Time Chunking style). Models the freeze-prefix + soft-mask blend over pre-computed chunks; it does not run a diffusion/flow policy or the gradient-guided sampler. Continuity is a runtime scheduling property, not a policy-quality or task-success claim.
